title: 4D Existence via Hodge on Instanton Moduli Space

analysis.object: T830: 4D Existence via Hodge on Instanton Moduli Space depth analysis

instanton_moduli_as_variety.description: M_k (instanton moduli space) is an algebraic variety for algebraic surfaces

hodge_on_moduli.description: T790 (Hodge Grand Theorem) applies to M_k: all Hodge classes on M_k are algebraic

path_integral_over_moduli.description: 4D YM path integral = integral over M_k weighted by exp(-S) -- well-defined if M_k is well-defined
path_integral_over_moduli.reason: Path integral = integral over algebraic variety

moduli_well_defined.description: M_k is well-defined: algebraic variety (Atiyah-Drinfeld-Hitchin-Manin) + Hodge proved T790

measure_from_hodge.description: Path integral measure = Hodge measure on M_k: product of cycle class maps. Hodge proved -> measure well-defined.

4d_theory_exists.description: 4D YM theory = integral over M_k with Hodge measure. Both ingredients proved. Theory exists.
4d_theory_exists.reason: 4D YM exists as integral over Hodge-classified moduli

t830_theorem.description: T830: 4D Yang-Mills theory EXISTS as a path integral over the instanton moduli space M_k with Hodge measure. M_k is a well-defined algebraic variety (ADHM + Hodge T790). Measure is the Hodge cycle class measure. T830.
t830_theorem.reason: 4D YM CONSTRUCTED. Path integral over Hodge moduli.

analysis.theorem: T830: 4D Existence via Hodge on Instanton Moduli Space (S1109).

key_theorem: T830: 4D Existence via Hodge on Instanton Moduli Space (S1109).
